撞大运穿越了。
这本应该是一个好消息，但问题是大龙没了。
就在她准备重开的时候，星野瞳发现这个世界好像是一个综漫世界。
星野瞳瞬间支楞了起来。
这个世界似乎也没有那么糟糕。
直到某一天，她打开自家卫生间的大门，打开了一个酷似里世界的大门后，她才知道，隐藏在平静的日常生活下，是何等危险的世界。
“合着这个综漫世界是现融的是吧？”
得知真相的星野瞳大受震撼。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6c5369bc28704b870a12391c2de757d5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"普罗米修斯18号","author_id":"","book_id":"7578836714202876990","book_name":"综漫：这世界真是越来越不对劲了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7426人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578836794452476478","read_count":"7426","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"512508"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"252","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,穿越,二次元,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6c5369bc28704b870a12391c2de757d5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249841&x-signature=MFP%2BaRIKUDf7Vgx7QhlbUkXx3vM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4394091311010760","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120401DEDFE829797460AFA439"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读52分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"f
